query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.videoUrl, c.title as course_title, c.category 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE l.published = 1 AND l.hidden = 0
ORDER BY c.category, c.title, l.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2BUx4aB33MgfJQi.28261bf45373 --database gkLpfNMVYQYMxzYT6m74Yk --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.videoUrl, c.title as course_title, c.category 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE l.published = 1 AND l.hidden = 0
ORDER BY c.category, c.title, l.sortOrder;
